name.zhCN: 图形语法与声明式可视化

summary.original: Build data visualizations with declarative grammars. Use when the user needs Vega-Lite, Vega, Observable Plot, or grammar-of-graphics reasoning, especially for tabular charts that do not require bespoke rendering.
summary.zhCN: 使用声明式语法构建数据可视化。适用于用户需要 Vega-Lite、Vega、Observable Plot 或图形语法推理的场景，尤其适合不需要定制渲染的表格型图表。

description.original: Build data visualizations with declarative grammars. Use when the user needs Vega-Lite, Vega, Observable Plot, or grammar-of-graphics reasoning, especially for tabular charts that do not require bespoke rendering. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: 使用声明式语法构建数据可视化。适用于用户需要 Vega-Lite、Vega、Observable Plot 或图形语法推理的场景，尤其适合不需要定制渲染的表格型图表。Agent-OPT 将官方技能文档适配为独立的双语 Web 技能工作室，提供章节导航、全文搜索和沙箱化源文件渲染；不会执行任何上游可执行脚本。

evidence.note: Pinned path-addressed SKILL.md from the official repository snapshot with content SHA cdb6fdb6aabde83e5efa5548480c2cf7bec3ab40.
License evidence from the official repository path for this skill or its parent plugin manifest.

license.evidence: Primary-source license identifier MIT recorded from plugins/build-web-data-visualization/.codex-plugin/plugin.json. Agent-OPT stores a local review copy of SKILL.md for Web rendering and does not execute upstream scripts.

name.zhCN: 准备面向具体任务的 Agent 执行手册

description.original: Rank the pinned skill sections against a bounded user objective and context, then produce an agent prompt, checklist, or reference pack without executing upstream scripts.
description.zhCN: 根据有边界的用户目标和上下文，对已固定版本的技能章节进行相关性排序，然后在不执行上游脚本的情况下生成 Agent 提示词、检查清单或参考资料包。

description.original: Open the full official skill document with structured sections.
description.zhCN: 以结构化章节打开完整官方技能文档。

description.original: Keyword search across the skill body with line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在技能正文中做关键词检索并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Jump between markdown headings and inspect one section at a time.
description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

description.original: List and safely preview text references, scripts, templates, and licenses captured from the exact upstream commit and recorded in BUNDLE.json.

notes: The in-process adapter reads only the curated original/Chinese bodies and BUNDLE.json-listed supporting files under this skill directory.
Supporting paths must match the fixed hash manifest; traversal, unknown files, symlinks, binary previews, and files above 400KB are rejected.
Upstream scripts and external services are not executed by this Web adaptation.
Selected in the quality-first priority tranche with exact official source and license provenance.
Complete Simplified Chinese body preserves frontmatter, heading hierarchy, code, inline tokens, links, and URLs; validation is automated.
The dedicated profile configures task examples, labels, context, output artifact, bilingual source, and pinned resource workflow for this skill.
Lifecycle is web-ready; verified remains reserved for a passing real Chromium report and any separately executable upstream workflow evidence.
原始 SKILL.md 保持不变；译文已逐节审校，并保留 frontmatter keys、代码块、命令、路径、链接和不可翻译的技术术语。

features: 声明式可视化任务 with two skill-specific task examples
数据语义与目标语法 and bounded private context input
声明式图表规格包 in agent-prompt, checklist, and reference-pack modes
complete Simplified Chinese and original SKILL.md switch
relevance-ranked official sections with outline, search, and full-text reader
pinned supporting-file browser backed by BUNDLE.json hashes
runtime activity and controlled validation feedback
dedicatedElements: 声明式可视化任务 input
数据语义与目标语法 panel
声明式图表规格包 result view

tests.evidence: skill-grammar-of-graphics-and-declarative-visualization: original and complete Chinese bodies opened through skill_open; skill_prepare returned ranked sections, prompt, and checklist; outline/search remained available.
skill-grammar-of-graphics-and-declarative-visualization: the capability-specific profile objective and context ran in Chinese through skill_prepare and returned a non-empty task artifact.

skill-grammar-of-graphics-and-declarative-visualization: empty objectives, unknown fields/sections, invalid locale, traversal, and missing supporting assets were rejected with InvocationValidationError.

skill-grammar-of-graphics-and-declarative-visualization: source bundle hashes and containment were checked; the adapter only reads curated files and grants no network, commands, secrets, or accounts.
